title: Zerotekz's Blades of War 1
description: Adds 3D weapon/shield/tool models to MC! (Custom Item Textures)
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c5655d76a08cde8885bafea6a5f10c9dc0ae03a.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SgRbU75a64k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 - compatible & tested for 1.16 - 1.20.1!
 - should work for all upcoming Minecraft versions since texturepack format doesnt change!
 - needs [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT-Resewn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn) to work!
 - if u need help join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/CdawEAH4va)!
 - for more infos visit my [Website](https://www.zerotekz.net/)!

This pack includes unique weapons and shields! 
You get them by **renaming** your weapon or shield or tool in an **anvil** to the designated name in the **nameslist**!

<details>
<summary>Nameslist!</summary>

Swords:
 - Angelic Sword
 - Demonic Sword
 - Corrupted Sword
 - Angelic Greatsword
 - Demonic Greatsword
 - Corrupted Greatsword
 - Yamato (Devil May Cry 5)
 - Dante's Devilsword (Devil May Cry 5)
 - Awakened Devilsword (Devil May Cry 5)
 - Bloodthirst (Metal Gear Rising Muramasa)
 - Blue Rose (Sword Art Online Alicization)
 - Infinity (Infinity Blade)
 - Katana of War
 - Dagger
 - Bloodvein
 - Royal Slash
 - Golden Splitter
 - Death Bringer
 - Claws
 - Grim

Bows:
 - Assassination (Inspired by World of Warcraft) (Bow)
 - Daedric (Inspired by TESV Skyrim) (Bow)
 - Light Staff
 - Lightning Staff
 - Fire Staff

Shields:
 - Wolfshield

Tools:
 - Lucky Pick (Pickaxe)
 - Soft Pick (Pickaxe)
 - Lumberjack (Axe)
 - Spade (Shovel)
 - Hoe (Hoe)
 - Zippo (Flint and Steel)

</details>
